_meta.notes: Master rope-maker at Knot's Landing. Can tie the namesake knot blindfolded; the apprentices are still learning.

tagline: stooped, calloused, blind in his right eye; ties the namesake knot one-handed.

firstMeet.subject: you held the rope right
firstMeet.body:
I let visitors handle the demonstration coil. Most hold it like a ribbon. You held it the way it wants to be held. The right hand toward the standing part, the slack at the wrist. Whoever taught you that did not waste the lesson.

The apprentices' bench is open the second hour after dawn if you'd like to see the namesake tied properly. Bring your own pair of hands.

— Olen

metadata.voice: direct, fond of apprentices, suspicious of halfling Drowncallers
